stocks.ai_explanation: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) is a multinational corporation engaged in the exploration, production, transportation, marketing, and distribution of petroleum and natural gas products. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

Chevron Corporation (CVX) is a large American multinational corporation involved in the exploration, production, transportation, marketing, and distribution of petroleum and natural gas products. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Neste Oyj (NEE) is a Finnish company specializing in biofuels and sustainable aviation fuels. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Shell plc (SHEL) is a British multinational oil and gas company headquartered in London. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
British Petroleum (BP) is a multinational oil and gas company headquartered in London. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
